functions.label: contentReferenceBlock
description:
Returns a contentReferenceBlock for a given ContentReference. A ContentReferenceBlock may be provided
to an LLM alongside grounding documents allowing the LLM to reference the documents in its output.

children.label: contentReference
description: A ContentReference

functions.label: contentReferenceString
description: Simplifies passing a contentReferenceBlock alongside grounding documents.

description: A ContentReference

functions.label: getConversationSharedState
description:
Determines the shared state of a conversation based on the number of users.
- If there are no users, the conversation is considered "Shared".
- If there is one user, the conversation is "Private".
- If there are multiple users, the conversation is "Restricted".

functions.label: getIsConversationOwner
description:
Checks if the current user is the owner of the conversation.
The owner is defined as the user who created the conversation or, in legacy conversations,
the only user in the conversation.

children.label: conversation
description: // keep type loose for use in both assistant package and security plugins

functions.label: getMarkdownWithOriginalValues
signature: ({ markdown, replacements, }: { markdown: string; replacements?: any; }) => string

functions.label: getOpenAndAcknowledgedAlertsQuery
description:
This query returns open and acknowledged (non-building block) alerts in the last 24 hours.

The alerts are ordered by risk score, and then from the most recent to the oldest.
signature: ({ alertsIndexPattern, anonymizationFields, end, filter, size, start, }: { alertsIndexPattern: string; anonymizationFields: z.infer<any>[]; end?:
| null | undefined; filter?: Record<string, unknown> | null | undefined; size: number; start?:

misc.label: INFERENCE_CHAT_MODEL_DISABLED_FEATURE_FLAG
description:
This feature flag disables the InferenceChatModel feature.

It may be overridden via the following setting in `kibana.yml` or `kibana.dev.yml`:
```
feature_flags.overrides:
  securitySolution.inferenceChatModelDisabled: true
```
